rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion To Vacate The Court'S Judgments Based On Prosecutorial Misconduct In Presenting False Facts And Argument Regarding C. Mwangi'S Owner Move-In Eviction And Subsequent Occupancy Of Unit At The Subjecthilll Street Property
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 22, 2021 line 1. DEFENDANT ANNE KIHAGI MOTION / Notice Of Motion To Vacate The Court'S Judgments Based On Prosecutorial Misconduct In Presenting False Facts And Argument Regarding C. Mwangi'S Owner Move-In Eviction And Subsequent Occupancy Of Unit At The Subject hilll Street Property is transferred to department 624 to be heard on August 27, 2021 at 10:00 a.m. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: OASIS GRILL, LLC ET AL VS. ERIC KETCHUM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order And Or Order Staying Discovery
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 22, 2021 line 6. PLAINTIFF OASIS GRILL, LLC, MOHAMMAD ZUGHAIYER Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order And Or Order Staying Discovery is DENIED. The factual basis for relief sought by plaintiff resolved with defendant's filing his Answer to the First Amended Complaint. Previously noticed depositions of plaintiff's retained experts to be scheduled on dates certain. Parties to appear with proposed deposition dates which will be included in the Order to be entered and may not be changed except by both parties' written stipulation or further Order of the Court. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). rulings.Case Title: DOMINADOR G ESTEBAN VS. YEVA, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 22, 2021 line 9. DEFENDANT YEVA, INC. DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege an actionable wrongdoing. Allegations of wrongdoing re: substitution of trustee and rebuffing attempts to modify a loan on a non-owner occupied property cannot support any of the causes of action alleged. Plaintiff shall have 20 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. Defendant to prepare order. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303).
